front.title: A YANG Data Model for Performance Monitoring Streaming on Common Transport Equipment

abstract.t: This document describes how the generic collection measurement YANG data model and its interval-capability companion model are applied to common transport equipment. It is informational. It defines a small YANG module of transport performance parameters, organizes those parameters into maintenance and QoS profiles, and gives end-to-end examples that show capability discovery followed by YANG-Push subscription, notification, and threshold reporting for a transport profile.
